pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit version from jackson-databind to rely on Spring Boot's managed BOM version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Explicit versions may conflict with Spring Boot 3's managed Jackson versions, leading to runtime classpath issues or missing features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove H2 database dependency as it is no longer needed or explicitly managed in this migration step.
Upgrade maven-surefire-plugin to a version compatible with modern Maven and Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Surefire versions may fail to execute tests or compile correctly on Java 17 due to module system restrictions.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/config/Swag.general_idea: Remove unused Springfox Swagger imports that are no longer referenced in the class.
Remove the @EnableSwagger2 annotation as the Swagger configuration is being removed.
Remove the Docket bean definition which configures the Swagger API documentation.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/exception/U.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 14+ serialization best practices and suppress warnings.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/model/UserE.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field for Java 14+ serialization best practices.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/Se.general_idea: Add migration comment to configure(AuthenticationManagerBuilder) method.
Add migration comment to authenticationManagerBean method.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Add configuration properties for SpringDoc OpenAPI to enable API documentation endpoints.
